# Lophos Notes

> Local-first notes for calm writing, private drafts, and clear thinking on Windows.

## Product summary

Lophos Notes is a Windows-focused notes application built around local ownership,
clarity, and a quieter writing flow. The website describes the product, links to
beta access, and provides terms and changelog pages.

## Key URLs

- Home: https://notes.lophos.space/
- Changelog: https://notes.lophos.space/changelog/
- Terms and policies: https://notes.lophos.space/terms/

## Contact

- Beta access and product questions: hello@mail.lophos.space
